position: plan-phase revision loop, iteration 1 of 3 — plan-checker ran (5 blockers + 3 warnings); revision pass 1 was dispatched but NOT applied (planner agent terminated before applying).

blockers.description: SendMessage to the completed 'phase6-planner' agent failed ('No agent named phase6-planner is currently addressable'). The agent terminated after returning PLANNING COMPLETE.
blockers.workaround: On resume, spawn a FRESH gsd-planner (model: opus) in revision mode with the FULL revision context embedded (a fresh agent has no prior context — include the files_to_read list AND the verbatim revision instructions captured in .continue-here.md).

decisions.decision: DB target for Phase 6 is Neon (NOT Supabase).
decisions.rationale: ROADMAP SC1/SC3 + CONTEXT D-03/D-05 (migration discipline DATA-03) are explicit about Neon. The staged Supabase move is a separate future migration, out of scope here. The memory note 'confirm DB target before Phase 6 planning' is resolved: Neon.

Locked decision D-01 AND ROADMAP SC2 both name engine.server.ts. D-01 pre-empts the portability rationale ('.server.ts suffix is bundle-hygiene only; module must remain import-pure regardless'). The suffix is a Vite client-bundle convention — imports fine from vitest/Node, so SC2 'callable from a Node script' holds. The researcher recommended engine.ts but that contradicts the locked decision; honoring D-01 needs no ROADMAP amendment. THE 5 PLANS CURRENTLY USE engine.ts AND MUST BE RENAMED.

decisions.decision: Revision pass 1 resolutions are all DECIDED (see .continue-here.md 'Revision Instructions'). Do not re-litigate; apply them.
decisions.rationale: B1 rename engine.server.ts everywhere; B2 split 06-02 Task 1 (Wave-0 tests RED-first, ≤5 files/task); B3 add ENG-03 metric-rule eval unit test; B4 DisclaimerCallout assertion uses test.skip so vitest exits 0; W1 move non-null-K content truths from 06-02 to 06-03; W2 add reports/layout.tsx sub-layout; W3 folds into B3; plus fix 06-03 Task 3 files_modified consumer filename.

next_action: Resume plan-phase 6 at the revision step: spawn a fresh gsd-planner (opus) in revision mode with the verbatim revision instructions from .continue-here.md, then re-run gsd-plan-checker, then finish steps 13–14.
context_notes: Standard /gsd-plan-phase 6 flow. yolo config but auto_advance=false, so finish with <offer_next> (manual), not auto-advance to execute. All gates already cleared: closed-phase (Pending), AI-SPEC (skipped — engine is deterministic, no runtime LLM), UI (06-UI-SPEC.md approved), schema-push (Drizzle → [BLOCKING] db:generate→db:migrate injected into 06-02), nyquist (06-VALIDATION.md present), security (ASVS L1, block-on high → threat_model required on report-path plans). phase_req_ids: ENG-01, ENG-02, ENG-03, RPT-01, RPT-02, RPT-03. Shared-tree caution: commit with explicit --files, never git add -A (other sessions write to .planning/).
